quotes.text: The journal is a vehicle for mindful reflection, where the raw material of life is shaped into understanding.
quotes.author: Kendra Cherry

quotes.text: We do not learn from experience... we learn from reflecting on experience.
quotes.author: John Dewey

quotes.text: Keep a diary, and one day your diary will keep you.
quotes.author: Mae West

quotes.text: Your journal is a safe harbor. Write with honesty, without judgment or evaluation.
quotes.author: Serene Guide

quotes.text: Journaling is like whispering to one's self and listening at the same time.
quotes.author: Mina Murray

quotes.text: In the journal I do not just express myself more openly than I could to any person; I create myself.
quotes.author: Susan Sontag

quotes.text: The act of writing is the first step toward making your thoughts real.
quotes.author: Unknown

templates.name: Evening Reflection 🌙
templates.description: Examine your day, process achievements, and release any stress.

templates.description: Deconstruct anxieties, categorize control, and calm your mind.
